title: Kelamale Paaykiraai Lyrics Thadaiyara Thaakka Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kelamalae
Singers: Aalap Raju, Rita
Lyrics: Madhan Karky

Kelamale kelamale paaykiraai ennakulle,
Naalellume Naalellume thooikiraai ennakulle,

Melum kilum melum kilum
malaigalin madiyile,
midhavayaai nee aagiraai

Hey vaanam aeri Megam keeri
thooral thinnum paravayaai pogiraai.

Nee kottisendra inbangal allida andangal
podhaadhena Naan kandaen

Naan thaeki vaitha thaagangal sollida
nerangal podhadhena naan kandaen

Yaarum pogaa aalathil unnulle neendhudhal
inbam enna naan kandaen

Melum kilum melum kilum malaigalin madiyile,
Midhavayaai nee aagiraai.

Hey vaanam aeri Megam keeri thooral thinnum
paravayaai pogiraai pogiraai

Naan unnai neengisellum nerathil nee ennai
ulvaangikolkiraai naan kandaen

Naan sindhi chellum muthathai vilummun nee
thaangikolkiraai naan kandaen

Aadaigalai meerinaai nenjukulle eeramai
maarukiraai naan kandaen

Melum kilum melum kilum malaigalin madiyile,
Midhavayaai nee aagiraai.
Hey vaanam aeri Megam keeri thooral thinnum
paravayaai pogiraai pogiraai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kelamale Paaykiraai?

The song captures a romantic and soothing theme, expressing deep emotions of love and longing.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Aalap Raju and Rita.

Who composed the music for Thadayara Thaaka?

The music was composed by Thaman S.

What is the release year of the movie Thadayara Thaaka?

The movie was released in the year 2012.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song enhances the romantic narrative of the film, adding depth to the characters' emotional journey.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Thadayara Thaaka, Kelamale Paaykiraai serves as a romantic interlude that deepens the connection between the lead characters. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Karky evoke emotions of love and longing. Aalap Raju and Rita's harmonious vocals, paired with Thaman S's enchanting composition, create a memorable musical experience. This duet beautifully conveys the tenderness and passion of a blossoming romance, making it a standout piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kelamale Paaykiraai from the movie Thadayara Thaaka is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the soulful voices of Aalap Raju and Rita, combined with Thaman S's enchanting music, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion. Dive into the soothing rhythms and let the lyrics by Karky transport you to a world of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Music: Thaman S Movie: Thadaiyara Thaakka
You are jumping inside me without a sound,
You are jumping inside me without a sound, every day you are washing away inside me,
In the lap of the mountains, you have become wise.
Hey, you rise to the sky, cut through the clouds, and go like a bird enjoying the drizzle.
I saw that the pleasures you bring are not enough to fill the void.
I saw that the times to express my thirst are not enough.
I saw the joy of swimming inside you where no one else goes.
In the lap of the mountains, you have become wise.
Hey, you rise to the sky, cut through the clouds, and go like a bird enjoying the drizzle.
I saw that when I try to leave you, you pull me back in.
I saw that before I could express my thoughts, you hold them back.
I saw that you have crossed boundaries and become a pain in my heart.
In the lap of the mountains, you have become wise. Hey, you rise to the sky, cut through the clouds, and go like a bird enjoying the drizzle.
